title: Vanilla Is Not Enough (VINE)
description: Enhancing Minecraft just with client-side mods!
body:
# This Modpack...
### Adds some client-side mods to enhance your experience, and some resource packs to... Also enhance your experience!!!

![Made for Servers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f461ee14ad2ccd08b36a0c7b663830eedb0e3d9e.png)

# Trailer
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fYde9Bbb1H4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


</details>

## About Animations

<details>
<summary>Face animations</summary>

![Detailed Animations x Just Expressions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/slufHzC2/images/3a5ed8bc02732ab8f2deb7281147dbb37db5a66b.gif)
  ##   **Important**
  If you want to have animated eyes like you see in the GIF, you need to adapt your skin to the texture pack, it's not hard, you can watch [this tutorial](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uDccyv7FROs) to know how to do it, ignore that it is another RP, the procedure is the same (o puedes ver [este si hablas español](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=96cv9srgw7M), tambien ignora que es otro paquete de texturas, el procedimiento es el mismo)

  If you DON'T WANT to have animated eyes, just go to Resource Packs and replace **'Detailed Animations x Just Expresions'** with **'Detail Animations'**
Because if you don't make your skin compatible by doing what was mentioned above, you'll have problems with your skin, unless you change the RP

</details>

## Important Key binds

<details>
<summary>Key binds</summary>

- Open Notebook: U
- Sort inventory: Middle mouse button
- Toggle 'Do a Barrel Roll': -
- Swap between Elytra & Chestplate: Left Alt
- Enter music selector: M
- Screenshoots in-game manager: I

</details>


</details>

## To see the mod and RP list
On this same page you must go to **versions**, then **select the version you want to install** and in the **Dependencies section** you will see all the mods and RPs
